sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n102194" key="tai/+ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τᾰΐτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ταὧς</etym>) <sense id="n102194.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">peacock stone</tr_>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πάγχρους</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cyran.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">38</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
